prestazioni: Engine: EA82T (1.8L SOHC flat-4 turbo) – Full forged internals with JE 8.5:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 20 psi boost handling. Stock crankshaft balanced to ±0.5g with a Fluidampr harmonic balancer.

Forced Induction: Garrett T25 .60/.48 hybrid turbo (custom billet compressor wheel) with a Turbonetics Deltagate 38mm wastegate, custom 3-inch stainless downpipe, and GReddy Type-S intercooler (2.5-inch core, 12x12x3.5 inches).

Fuel & Ignition: Walbro 255 lph in-tank fuel pump, Bosch 0280155967 440cc injectors, AEM 30-0300 Wideband UEGO, and HKS 264°/256° camshafts with adjustable vernier pulleys. MSD 6AL ignition with Blaster 2 coil and NGK BCPR7ES spark plugs gapped at 0.028 inches.
estetica: Body: Rare JDM-only 'Leone RS Turbo' front lip (OEM Subaru part #80401AC000) with a custom 3-piece carbon fiber rear diffuser by Seibon. Full respray in Subaru '51E Pastel Blue' (original 1985 JDM color code) with 3M Matte Black vinyl wrap on the hood and roof.

Wheels: Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +15 (front) and 15x9 +20 (rear) in Gunmetal, wrapped in Toyo R888R 195/50R15 (front) and 225/50R15 (rear). OEM 4x100 to 4x114.3 adapter plates with extended wheel studs (ARP 7/16-20).

Interior: Recaro SRD (1986 JDM-spec) front seats with custom Alcantara inserts (color-matched to Subaru '51E Pastel Blue'), OMP 330mm suede steering wheel with a Nardi Classic 58mm quick-release hub, and a full CUSCO bolt-in 8-point roll cage (chrome-moly, 1.75-inch diameter).
